# Phone Farm вЂ” Instagram & TikTok Automation Platform

A Flask-based phone farm management system that controls Android devices via ADB to automate Instagram and TikTok actions at scale.

## Stack

- **Backend**: Python 3.12, Flask 3.0.3
- **Database**: SQLite via Flask-SQLAlchemy 3.1.1 + Flask-Migrate / Alembic
- **Device automation**: uiautomator2, adbutils (ADB over USB/TCP)
- **Image/OCR**: Pillow, pytesseract, OpenCV, NumPy
- **Task scheduling**: APScheduler 3.10.4
- **Frontend**: Jinja2 templates, Tailwind CSS v3 (Play CDN), Font Awesome, vanilla JS
- **Entry point**: `run.py` в†’ `app.run(debug=True)`, started via `start.bat`

## Project Layout

```
Instagram/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ run.py                          # Entry point
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ config.py                       # Flask config (SECRET_KEY, DB URI, rate limits, daily action caps)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ start.bat                       # Windows launcher
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ requirements.txt
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ instagram_farm.db               # SQLite database (auto-created)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ assets/                         # ADB/device assets managed by DeviceManager
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ uploads/                        # Media files staged for device push
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ app/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ __init__.py                 # create_app() вЂ” registers blueprints, DB, migrations, background tasks
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ extensions.py               # db, migrate singletons
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ template_filters.py         # Jinja2 custom filters
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ models/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ device.py               # Device model
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ instagram_account.py    # InstagramAccount model
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tiktok_account.py       # TikTokAccount model
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ direct_message.py
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ post_comment.py
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ api/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ __init__.py             # Blueprint + all url_rule registrations
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ device_routes.py        # /api/devices/*
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ instagram_routes.py     # /api/instagram/*
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ tiktok_routes.py        # /api/tiktok/*
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ admin/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ __init__.py             # Blueprint (template_folder='templates')
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ routes.py               # Admin UI routes вЂ” dashboard, devices, accounts, tasks, api-docs
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ templates/admin/
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ base.html           # Tailwind + dark mode + nav + toast system
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ dashboard.html
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ devices.html
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ instagram_accounts.html
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tiktok_accounts.html
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tasks.html
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ api_docs.html
в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ error.html
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ utils/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ adb.py                  # ADBManager вЂ” execute_operation() dispatcher
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ device_manager.py       # DeviceManager вЂ” ADB discovery & status
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ auto_device_manager.py  # Background ADB polling
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ background_tasks.py     # APScheduler jobs (daily stat reset, etc.)
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ instagram_automation.py # Low-level IG UI automation via uiautomator2
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ instagram_task_manager.py # IG task queue
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tiktok_automation.py    # Low-level TT UI automation via uiautomator2
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tiktok_task_manager.py  # TT task queue
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ task_manager.py        # Shared task base
в””в”Ђв”Ђ migrations/
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ versions/
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ add_tiktok_support.py
        в””в”Ђв”Ђ add_imap_to_instagram_accounts.py
```

## Blueprints & URL Prefixes

| Blueprint | Prefix   | Purpose                        |
|-----------|----------|--------------------------------|
| api       | /api     | REST API (JSON)                |
| admin     | /admin   | HTML admin panel               |

## Models

### Device (`devices` table)
- `device_id` (PK string), `device_name`, `status` (connected/disconnected/error)
- `platform` (instagram/tiktok/both), `assigned_to`, `is_initialized`
- `last_seen`, `error_message`

### InstagramAccount (`instagram_accounts` table)
- `username`, `password`, `device_id` (FK в†’ devices, SET NULL)
- `login_status` (bool), `email`, `email_password`, `imap_server`, `imap_port` (default 993)
- `last_login`, `last_logout`, `error_message`
- Counters: `total_likes`, `total_comments`, `total_follows`, `total_unfollows`, `total_stories_viewed`, `total_story_likes`, `total_dms`
- Daily counters: same set prefixed `daily_*` + `last_daily_reset`
- Methods: `update_stats(action_type)`, `get_daily_stats()`, `get_total_stats()`, `to_dict()`

### TikTokAccount (`tiktok_accounts` table)
- `username`, `password`, `device_id` (FK)
- `target_usernames` (JSON list), `follow_limit`, `like_limit`
- Daily/total counters: `daily_follows`, `daily_likes`, `daily_comments`, `daily_story_likes`, `daily_profile_views`, and `total_*` equivalents
- Methods: `to_dict()`

## REST API вЂ” All Endpoints

### Devices (`/api/devices`)
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | /devices/list | List all devices |
| POST | /devices/create | Create device |
| PUT | /devices/{device_id} | Update device |
| DELETE | /devices/{device_id} | Delete device |
| POST | /devices/assign | Assign device to account |
| POST | /devices/{device_id}/unassign | Unassign device |
| POST | /devices/operations/bulk | Bulk ADB operations (reboot, clear_instagram, clear_tiktok, internet_check) |
| GET | /devices/user/{user_id} | Devices for user |
| GET | /devices/free | Unassigned devices |

### Instagram Accounts (`/api/instagram`)
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | /instagram/accounts/list | List all IG accounts |
| POST | /instagram/accounts | Add single account (username, password, device_id?, email?, email_password?, imap_server?, imap_port?) |
| POST | /instagram/accounts/bulk | Bulk import вЂ” array or newline text `user:pass:email:email_pw:imap_server:imap_port` |
| DELETE | /instagram/accounts/{username} | Delete account |
| POST | /instagram/accounts/bulk-delete | Delete multiple accounts |
| POST | /instagram/login | Login account on device |
| POST | /instagram/logout | Logout account |
| GET | /instagram/tasks | List all IG tasks |
| GET | /instagram/tasks/{task_id} | Get task status |

### Instagram Actions (`/api/instagram/actions`)
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| POST | /instagram/actions/like-post | Like a post |
| POST | /instagram/actions/comment-post | Comment on post |
| POST | /instagram/actions/follow | Follow user |
| POST | /instagram/actions/unfollow | Unfollow user |
| POST | /instagram/actions/view-story | View story |
| POST | /instagram/actions/like-story | Like story |
| POST | /instagram/actions/comment-story | Comment on story |
| POST | /instagram/actions/send-dm | Send direct message |
| POST | /instagram/actions/post-reel | Post reel |
| POST | /instagram/actions/post-photo | Post photo |
| POST | /instagram/actions/upload-media | Upload media to device |

### TikTok Accounts (`/api/tiktok`)
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | /tiktok/accounts/list | List all TT accounts |
| POST | /tiktok/accounts | Add account |
| PUT | /tiktok/accounts/{username} | Update account |
| DELETE | /tiktok/accounts/{username} | Delete account |
| POST | /tiktok/accounts/bulk-delete | Delete multiple accounts |
| GET | /tiktok/tasks | List all TT tasks |
| GET | /tiktok/tasks/{task_id} | Get task status |
| POST | /tiktok/tasks/{task_id}/stop | Stop running task |

### TikTok Actions (`/api/tiktok/actions`)
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| POST | /tiktok/actions/follow | Follow user |
| POST | /tiktok/actions/like-posts | Like posts |
| POST | /tiktok/actions/view-profile | View profile |
| POST | /tiktok/actions/comment | Comment |
| POST | /tiktok/actions/like-story | Like story |
| POST | /tiktok/actions/run-collection | Mass collection вЂ” fetch followers of targets, filter, act |

## Admin UI Pages

| URL | Template | Description |
|-----|----------|-------------|
| /admin/ | dashboard.html | Stats overview вЂ” devices, IG logged-in/errors, TT count, daily actions breakdown |
| /admin/devices | devices.html | Device table with bulk ADB actions (reboot, clear IG, clear TT, internet check) |
| /admin/instagram/accounts | instagram_accounts.html | IG account table, add single/bulk modal (includes IMAP fields) |
| /admin/tiktok/accounts | tiktok_accounts.html | TT account table, add single/bulk modal |
| /admin/tasks | tasks.html | Live AJAX task monitor вЂ” IG + TT tasks, auto-refresh every 10s |
| /admin/api-docs | api_docs.html | Full REST API documentation with search |

## Dark Mode

Tailwind `darkMode: 'class'` вЂ” toggled by adding/removing `dark` class on `<html>`. Preference stored in `localStorage`. OS preference detected on first visit. Toggle button in top nav.

## Key Config Values (config.py)

```python
MAX_DAILY_ACTIONS = {
    'likes': 50, 'comments': 20, 'follows': 30, 'unfollows': 30, 'stories': 100
}
INSTAGRAM_LOGIN_TIMEOUT = 30   # seconds
INSTAGRAM_ACTION_DELAY  = 2    # seconds between actions
API_RATE_LIMIT = '500/hour'
```

## Database Migrations

Run via Flask-Migrate:
```bash
flask db upgrade
```
Migration files in `migrations/versions/`. SQLite-safe вЂ” all schema changes use `batch_alter_table`.

## Running

```bash
start.bat
# or
venv\Scripts\python.exe run.py
```

App starts on `http://localhost:5000`. Admin panel at `http://localhost:5000/admin/`.
